rationale: No conflict. Elec. Code §253.098 governs corporate/labor campaign communications with stockholders or members; it is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: A corporation or labor organization may make one or more direct campaign expenditures from its own property for the purpose of communicating directly with its stockholders or members
_note: Rule text concerns election law campaign expenditures, not property tax homestead exemptions; no overlap with proposed change.
